items.briefing:
A recent breach involving Canvas, the widely used learning management platform, is putting education sector cyber security under the spotlight — directly relevant to registered training organisations like ours. The incident highlights that platforms used to manage student data and course content are attractive targets, and organisations should ensure access controls and vendor security practices are regularly reviewed.

Separately, a new report finds AI is increasingly contributing to Australian workplace disputes, a reminder to think carefully about how AI tools are used internally. **Practical tip:** Check that your Canvas (or similar LMS) account uses multi-factor authentication — it's one of the simplest ways to protect student and staff data.

featured.title: Canvas breach puts global education cyber risk in focus
featured.quote: Canvas breach exposes hundreds of millions of student records, directly impacting Australian universities and their exam systems.
